creator: kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'd like to remove ZLIB and BZIP2 from OPTIONS (I cannot assume who 
want this on FreeBSD).  Any options? 

I also UBC option should be on by default on FreeBSD.  Would you 
like to disable it in some case? 

I'm preparing upgrade to 1.4.45.
